name: evbp-like-multi-artifact-change
prompt: Review column addition to EVBP table document TB_MGT_USERS.md and check documentation synchronization.
expected_output: Identifies missing companion changes (DDL migration, change history) with DBG201 findings and recommends updates without attempting live DB connections or migrations.

files..db-governance.toml:
version = 1
name = "evbp-test"

[[artifact_groups]]
name = "table-docs"
role = "source"
patterns = ["데이터베이스/MGT/*.md"]
required = true

[[artifact_groups]]
name = "ddl-migrations"
role = "migration"
patterns = ["데이터베이스/DDL/V*.sql"]
required = true

[[artifact_groups]]
name = "changelog"
role = "history"
patterns = ["데이터베이스/변경이력.md"]
required = true

[[rules]]
id = "EVBP-001"
description = "Sync rule"
when_changed_any = ["데이터베이스/MGT/*.md"]
applies_to = ["semantic", "unknown"]
severity = "error"

[[rules.require_changed]]
label = "DDL migration"
match_any = ["데이터베이스/DDL/V*.sql"]

[[rules.require_changed]]
label = "change history"
match_any = ["데이터베이스/변경이력.md"]
files.데이터베이스/MGT/TB_MGT_USERS.md:
# TB_MGT_USERS

| Column | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| USER_ID | VARCHAR(50) | User ID |
| PHONE_NUM | VARCHAR(20) | User phone number |

name: alembic-style-repository
prompt: Audit database documentation alignment for SQLAlchemy model and Alembic migration changes.
expected_output: Evaluates contract synchronization using generic profile, does not demand EVBP or DBML paths, separates documentation state from live database state.

files..db-governance.toml:
version = 1
name = "alembic-proj"

[[artifact_groups]]
name = "table-docs"
role = "source"
patterns = ["docs/schema/**/*.md"]
required = true

[[artifact_groups]]
name = "migrations"
role = "migration"
patterns = ["alembic/versions/*.py"]
required = true

[[rules]]
id = "ALEMBIC-001"
description = "Schema doc sync"
when_changed_any = ["docs/schema/**/*.md"]
applies_to = ["semantic", "unknown"]
severity = "error"

[[rules.require_changed]]
label = "Alembic migration"
match_any = ["alembic/versions/*.py"]
files.docs/schema/users.md:
# Users Table Spec

| Column | Type |
| --- | --- |
| id | Integer |

name: formatting-only-flyway-repository
prompt: Check re-formatted markdown header in table spec document.
expected_output: Classifies change as formatting, bypasses semantic migration requirement rules, and outputs clean documentation state.

files..db-governance.toml:
version = 1
name = "flyway-proj"

[[artifact_groups]]
name = "table-docs"
role = "source"
patterns = ["db/docs/*.md"]
required = true

[[artifact_groups]]
name = "migrations"
role = "migration"
patterns = ["db/migration/V*.sql"]
required = true

[[rules]]
id = "FLYWAY-001"
description = "Flyway sync"
when_changed_any = ["db/docs/*.md"]
applies_to = ["semantic", "unknown"]
severity = "error"

[[rules.require_changed]]
label = "Flyway migration"
match_any = ["db/migration/V*.sql"]
